{{Expand}}

{{Infobox concept
| name = Karoshan magic
| introduced = lh-03-the-knight
}}

== The Knight ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Karoshan magic]] is monitoring the general state of the crowd.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c13">''The Knight'', chapter 13</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|"Any of those drones could belong to the King Regent, and there’s Karoshan magic monitoring the general state of the crowd."<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c13" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:The Knight]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon concepts]]
